data.title: Why Is ImmunityBio Stock Soaring On Friday?
data.description: Shares of ImmunityBio Inc. (NASDAQ: IBRX) saw an increase on Friday as the company wrapped up manufacturing engineering programs for its NK cell therapy platform. The surge in IBRX stock is attributed to the establishment of a safe, reproducible, and scalable manufacturing pathway. ImmunityBio successfully completed its NK2022 (Cancer and Healthy Volunteers) and NK2023 (Healthy Volunteers) programs, involving 64 participants with no serious adverse events. The company showcased its capability to generate up to five billion NK cells from a single apheresis collection. Furthermore, ImmunityBio is progressing with its phase 1 trial (QUILT-3.076), where M-ceNK cells are being combined with ANKTIVA, showing promising results.

data.title: VeChain's StarGate halves VTHO inflation with 10.7B VET locked and 93.9% more active stakers post-Hayabusa hard fork.
data.description: VeChain's StarGate platform has seen significant progress three months post Hayabusa hard fork. Currently, there are 10.7 billion VET locked in the platform, indicating a substantial increase in user engagement. The number of active stakers has witnessed a remarkable growth of 93.9%, showcasing the community's strong participation. Moreover, VTHO emissions have been reduced by 50%, a move that is likely to impact the network dynamics positively.

data.title: Bay Area's Premier Literary Event Returns: NKF Authors Luncheon Set for March 29th in San Francisco
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in San Francisco, the 37th Annual Authors Luncheon will be held by the National Kidney Foundation (NKF) on March 29th, 2026, at the Hyatt Regency Embarcadero. The prestigious event will feature nationally acclaimed authors along with two selections from the Oprah Book Club. This year's gathering is expected to draw a significant crowd and generate much excitement as it continues its tradition of celebrating literary talent.

data.title: Breath Analyzers Market worth $5.63 billion by 2031 | MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of March 13, 2026, the Breath Analyzers Market is forecasted to increase from approximately USD 2.95 billion in 2026 to USD 5.63 billion by 2031. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 13.8%. The market data includes 250 tables and 50 figures distributed across 300 pages, indicating a significant expansion in the industry.

data.title: Year of the Horse Kicks Off with a Multi-Category Procurement Boom on Yiwugo
data.description: In Yiwu, China, as of March 13, 2026, Yiwugo.com serves as the official website for the prestigious Yiwu Commodity Market, recognized as the largest wholesale market globally. Following the recent celebration of the 2026 Lunar New Year, the Yiwu International Trade City has embarked on a fresh venture amidst the festivities.

data.title: Reply at NVIDIA GTC: Digital twins and physical AI driving the next stage of industrial value creation
data.description: A technology company, Reply [EXM, STAR: REY], is scheduled to showcase at the upcoming NVIDIA GTC event taking place from March 16 to 19, 2026, in San Jose, California. The presentation will focus on demonstrating ways in which businesses can enhance real production and logistics operations, expand robotics capabilities, and improve industrial efficiency sustainably through the utilization of digital twin technology.

data.title: LHV Group's own share acquisition transactions
data.description: LHV Group has recently revealed that between March 6th and March 12th, 2026, they purchased their own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange.
